# i18next Vendor Assets

This directory contains the browser UMD build of i18next for PDFomator's offline-first static app.

- `i18next.min.js`: i18next `26.3.2`, downloaded from `https://unpkg.com/i18next@26.3.2/dist/umd/i18next.min.js`

The app loads this local file from `index.html`; runtime localization data is kept in `main.js`.
